import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const InfoDriver = () => { const [trucks, setTrucks] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { fetch('http://localhost:5000/api/trucks') .then((res) => res.json()) .then((data) => setTrucks(data)) .catch((err) => console.error("Gagal mengambil data truck:", err)); }, []); return (

{trucks.length === 0 ? (

Tidak ada data truk yang tersedia.

) : ( trucks.map(truck => (

Truck ID: {truck.truckId}

Tipe: {truck.truckType}

Driver: {truck.driver}

Status: {truck.status}

Tanggal: {truck.date ? truck.date.split('T')[0] : ''}

Lihat lebih lengkap →
)) )}
); }; export default InfoDriver;
